title: Pickled Garlic Mediterranean Stir-fry
description: A flavorful and adventurous mediterranean dish infused with the sweetness of garlic, savory bay leaves, and tangy pickle, suitable for whole30 diet.

ingredients.name: onions, thinly sliced
ingredients.notes: can be finely chopped if preferred

ingredients.name: tomato sauce or paste
ingredients.notes: for added sweetness and umami flavor

ingredients.name: pineapple chunks (optional)
ingredients.notes: to complement the dish, reduce for a sweeter taste if needed

ingredients.name: bay leaves
ingredients.notes: fresh or dried, choose fresh for better flavor and aroma

ingredients.name: paprika
ingredients.notes: smoky or regular can be used based on taste preference

ingredients.name: red pepper flakes (optional)
ingredients.notes: for a touch of heat, adjust to taste

ingredients.name: pickled garlic
ingredients.notes: used as a souring agent for the dish

instructions: Heat olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add minced garlic cloves, onions, and diced bell peppers to the hot oil. Stir-fry for about 2-3 minutes until onions become translucent and vegetables are slightly softened.
Pour tomato sauce into the pan with a pinch of salt and pepper. Mix well and let it simmer for another minute.
Add pineapple chunks (if using) and bay leaves, stirring occasionally to prevent sticking. Let them cook for about 2-3 minutes more until most of the liquid evaporates.
Stir in pickled garlic and red pepper flakes (if used). Continue to stir-fry for an additional 1 minute.
Season with salt and pepper as needed to taste, then remove from heat.
Serve immediately over cooked rice or noodles for a meal.
